name: Notify Server
description: Local HTTP/IPC server that receives push notifications from Claude sessions running inside terminals (via the cw-notify MCP tool). Surfaces notify_chat_title, notify_done, notify_needs_input, and notify_info events back into the VS Code UI.
guidelines: The notify port is dynamic (assigned at startup) and passed to each session via the MCP config env; never hardcode it.
Handle onTitle events by delegating to SessionManager.applyRemoteTitle so the terminal tab and persisted title stay in sync.
anti_patterns: Bind the TCP server to 0.0.0.0 on non-Windows — bind to 127.0.0.1 except on Windows where WSL sessions require 0.0.0.0.
Accept incoming payloads without authentication — every payload must include a per-launch shared secret token (CODE_WORKBENCH_NOTIFY_TOKEN) validated server-side before processing.
decisions: 2026-05-19: Bind address is now 127.0.0.1 on non-Windows, 0.0.0.0 only on Windows (WSL adapter requirement).
2026-05-19: Per-launch notifyToken = randomBytes(32).hex generated at startup, injected into MCP env as CODE_WORKBENCH_NOTIFY_TOKEN, and validated on every incoming line in startServer.
